title: Where Should Optimizer State Live? Tiered State Allocation for Memory-Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Training
innovation_summary: Where Should Optimizer State Live? Tiered State Allocation for Memory-Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Training: We study SkewAdam, an optimizer built on the observation that the three parameter populations of an MoE - the dense backbone, the experts, and the router.
